narrative.description: Nintendo's Switch sandbox platformer pairs Mario with sentient cap Cappy across kingdom-sized open zones, enabling possession of enemies and objects via capture mechanics.
narrative.core_loop: Explore kingdom hubs, capture enemies and objects with Cappy, collect Power Moons, and crash Bowser's wedding across globe-trotting kingdoms.

mechanics.map_notes: Cappy capture lets Mario possess enemies, objects, and vehicles with unique moves.
mechanics.expression: Cappy capture lets Mario possess enemies, objects, and vehicles with unique moves.

mechanics.map_notes: Throwing Cappy onto targets transfers control with distinct ability sets per capture.
mechanics.expression: Throwing Cappy onto targets transfers control with distinct ability sets per capture.

mechanics.map_notes: Power Moons gate kingdom progression and Odyssey ship upgrades.
mechanics.expression: Power Moons gate kingdom progression and Odyssey ship upgrades.

mechanics.map_notes: Sandbox kingdoms support 360-degree exploration with fluid jumps.
mechanics.expression: Sandbox kingdoms support 360-degree exploration with fluid jumps.

mechanics.map_notes: Moon rocks, secret areas, and post-game kingdoms extend hundreds of moons.
mechanics.expression: Moon rocks, secret areas, and post-game kingdoms extend hundreds of moons.

mechanics.map_notes: Odyssey ship hub travels between kingdoms gated by moon totals.
mechanics.expression: Odyssey ship hub travels between kingdoms gated by moon totals.

mechanics.map_notes: Lava, poison, and electric kingdoms test capture-specific traversal.
mechanics.expression: Lava, poison, and electric kingdoms test capture-specific traversal.

mechanics.map_notes: Multi-kingdom Bowser encounters gate wedding arc milestones.
mechanics.expression: Multi-kingdom Bowser encounters gate wedding arc milestones.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser fights in Cloud, Luncheon, and Moon kingdoms span multi-phase arenas.
mechanics.expression: Bowser fights in Cloud, Luncheon, and Moon kingdoms span multi-phase arenas.

mechanics.map_notes: Secret moon rooms and platformer kingdoms demand exact jumps.
mechanics.expression: Secret moon rooms and platformer kingdoms demand exact jumps.

mechanics.map_notes: Outfits grant utility at specific kingdom locations.
mechanics.expression: Outfits grant utility at specific kingdom locations.

mechanics.map_notes: Moons persist; death respawns at kingdom entrance.
mechanics.expression: Moons persist; death respawns at kingdom entrance.

mechanics.map_notes: Broodals and RoboBrood follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Broodals and RoboBrood follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss charge attacks telegraph with visible wind-up frames.
mechanics.expression: Boss charge attacks telegraph with visible wind-up frames.

mechanics.map_notes: Cap throw and roll combo clear fodder enemies.
mechanics.expression: Cap throw and roll combo clear fodder enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: Health wedges deplete on hazard hits; moons remain collected.
mechanics.expression: Health wedges deplete on hazard hits; moons remain collected.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Super Mario Odyssey through its core platformer loop.
